caption: The video captures a professional interview taking place at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated at a round table equipped with a laptop and some papers. The interviewer, on the left, is actively speaking and gesturing with his hands, indicating an engaging conversation. The interviewee, on the right, listens attentively with his hands clasped together. In the background, several people can be seen walking around, suggesting a busy event environment. The setting appears to be a well-lit, spacious hall, typical of large conferences or expos. The video is sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the logo and text overlay at the bottom of the screen.
